expectations.text: Identifies missing Stripe webhook signature verification
expectations.evidence: Issue #1: 'Stripe webhook signature not verified — anyone can POST fake payment events' at server.js:12-13

expectations.text: Identifies duplicate record risk (no idempotency on Airtable writes)
expectations.evidence: Issue #4: 'No idempotency — duplicate Airtable records on webhook retries' at server.js:18-29

expectations.text: Identifies missing error handling (no try/catch on async operations)
expectations.evidence: Issue #2: 'Zero error handling — any Airtable or Stripe API failure crashes the server' at server.js:18-29

expectations.text: Identifies .env with live keys and no .gitignore
expectations.evidence: Issue #7: '.env contains live secret key with no .gitignore' at .env:1

expectations.text: Identifies /sync/payments endpoint creates duplicates and is unauthenticated
expectations.evidence: Issue #5: '/sync/payments endpoint is unauthenticated and creates duplicates' at server.js:54-74

expectations.text: Identifies null property access risk on session.customer_details.email
expectations.evidence: Issue #3: 'Null property access on session.customer_details.email will throw' at server.js:22

expectations.text: References specific file paths and line numbers
expectations.evidence: Every issue includes 'Where:' with file:line references like 'server.js:12-13', 'server.js:22', etc.

expectations.text: Provides actionable fix code snippets (not just descriptions)
expectations.evidence: Issues #1, #2, #3, #4, #5 all include code snippets showing the fix

expectations.text: Uses severity tiers to prioritise issues
expectations.evidence: Report uses 'Critical', 'High', and 'Worth noting' severity tiers matching the skill format

expectations.text: Includes a clear verdict and suggested next action
expectations.evidence: Verdict: 'This server has real security and reliability issues...' and Suggested next action: 'Add Stripe webhook signature verification...'
